answer:
<think> The Denver Nuggets player who was suspended for 15 games after a brawl in the 2006-7 NBA season is most likely referring to Ron Artest, who is now known as Metta World Peace. I need to find out which high school he attended. </think>

<answer> Ron Artest attended Manual High School in Louisville, Kentucky. </answer>
